query: SELECT DATE(tradeDate) as trade_date, SUM(CAST(pnl AS DECIMAL(15,4))) as totalPnl, COUNT(*) as tradeCount, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(pnl AS DECIMAL(15,4)) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as winCount FROM trades WHERE userId = 1 AND status = 'closed' AND tradeDate >= '2026-03-01' AND tradeDate <= '2026-03-31' GROUP BY trade_date ORDER BY trade_date;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user DudnYU5DJGjDb7x.f55d5c05eef2 --database ABPfAgYoAEjhmeNLtca7tc --execute SELECT DATE(tradeDate) as trade_date, SUM(CAST(pnl AS DECIMAL(15,4))) as totalPnl, COUNT(*) as tradeCount, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(pnl AS DECIMAL(15,4)) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as winCount FROM trades WHERE userId = 1 AND status = 'closed' AND tradeDate >= '2026-03-01' AND tradeDate <= '2026-03-31' GROUP BY trade_date ORDER BY trade_date;
